aljazeera.title: US says strikes launched as explosions heard in southern Iran
‘They brought me here to kill me’ says Gaza doctor in Israeli prison

monitor_the_situation.title: US Airstrike Hits School in Tehran, Kills Nearly 200
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 45m ago. A US airstrike struck a school in Tehran, killing nearly 200 children and adults, according to CNN sources, amid ongoing US strikes on Iran.
US Launches Major Airstrikes on Iran Over Hormuz Ceasefire Violation
Iran Condemns US Strikes Across Southern Iran

— S3 · Political · Strait of Hormuz · 1h ago. Iranian Foreign Ministry condemns US airstrikes across southern Iran as a violation of the U.S.-Iran MOU and warns of a likely resumption of Iranian strikes.
US Strikes in Iran Four to Five Times Larger Than Previous Attacks
